hero.label: Digital Invitations
hero.subtitle: Create stunning digital invitations for your wedding or special event. Share instantly, collect RSVPs in real time — all in one place.

preview.invite_label: You are cordially invited to the wedding of

hiw.label: Simple process
hiw.title: Ready in under 2 minutes
hiw.subtitle: No design skills needed. No app to install. Just a beautiful invitation your guests will love.

steps.title: Pick a template
steps.description: Browse our curated collection of wedding and event templates. Find the design that matches your style.

steps.title: Personalise your details
steps.description: Add your names, date, venue and a personal message. Upload a background photo or choose from our gallery.

steps.title: Share your link
steps.description: Get a unique invitation link instantly. Share it via WhatsApp, email or any messaging app — no printing required.

steps.title: Collect RSVPs
steps.description: Guests confirm their attendance with one tap. You get notified immediately and can track responses in real time.

steps.title: Manage your guest list
steps.description: View accepted and declined responses, see attendance numbers and update event details at any time.

features.label: Everything you need
features.title: Built for modern couples
features.subtitle: All the tools to manage your invitations — without the hassle of paper, printing or spreadsheets.

items.title: Instant RSVP tracking
items.description: Know who is coming the moment they respond. Accepted, declined and pending guests — all in one dashboard.

items.title: Works on any device
items.description: Guests open the invitation directly in their browser — no app required, no sign-up. It just works, on any phone or computer.

items.title: Venue map included
items.description: Embed an interactive map so guests can get directions to your venue in one tap. No confusion, no late arrivals.

items.title: Beautiful custom design
items.description: Choose from handcrafted templates for weddings, baptisms and anniversaries. Add your own photos to make it truly yours.

items.title: Real-time notifications
items.description: Receive an instant notification every time a guest RSVPs. Stay on top of your guest list without checking manually.

items.title: Edit anytime
items.description: Changed the venue or time? Update your invitation in seconds and all your guests will see the new details immediately.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions. No hidden fees. Pay once and your invitation is live as long as you need it.

personal.name: Personal Link
personal.description: Each guest receives a personalised link with their name on the invitation.

unlimited.name: Unlimited
unlimited.description: One link for all your guests — unlimited sharing, unlimited RSVPs.

templates.label: See it in action
templates.title: Browse our invitation styles
templates.subtitle: Tap any template to preview a live invitation — no account needed.

preview_steps.title: Welcome cover
preview_steps.subtitle: Names, date and venue in one elegant opener.

preview_steps.title: Our story
preview_steps.subtitle: A short timeline that feels personal and warm.

preview_steps.title: Day schedule
preview_steps.subtitle: Clear timings so guests know what happens next.

preview_steps.title: Dress code
preview_steps.subtitle: Set tone and colors with one quick visual block.

preview_steps.title: Accommodation
preview_steps.subtitle: Help guests book nearby stays with confidence.

preview_steps.title: Countdown
preview_steps.subtitle: Build excitement as the big day gets closer.

preview_steps.title: RSVP
preview_steps.subtitle: Collect confirmations in seconds with one tap.

themes.name: Classic
themes.tagline: Timeless elegance with gold accents and serif typography

themes.name: Romantic
themes.tagline: Soft florals, rose tones and delicate curves

themes.name: Modern
themes.tagline: Bold, dark layouts with striking contrast

themes.name: Natural
themes.tagline: Earthy greens and organic textures for nature lovers

sections.label: Flexible Content
sections.title: 16 sections. Endless combinations.
sections.subtitle: Mix and match the sections that fit your day best. Build a light version or go all in.
sections.teaser: Try combinations and watch your total update live

footer.tagline: Beautiful digital invitations for your most important moments.
